meta.scoring_note: min-max scaled within the analyzed candidate cohort; 100 = highest among analyzed, not an absolute score

engineers.narrative: Drove PostHog's Agent Platform from scaffold to prod-readiness (Django product, Modal sandboxes, Redis bus, approvals, AI gateway) while landing infra reaching 100+ engineers: env-driven Kafka cluster routing, CDP Valkey dual-write, and ClickHouse metrics ingestion.

evidence.title: feat(agent-platform): core Agent Platform feature branch (all agent platform services)
evidence.summary: Consolidated all agent-platform services into the canonical long-lived feature branch; multi-service scaffolding.

evidence.title: feat: Setup kafka client routing via env vars
evidence.summary: Added env-driven per-topic Kafka cluster routing with router classes and a semgrep guard.

evidence.title: feat: Setup dual writing for cdp services to valkey
evidence.summary: Added shadow Valkey dual-write/read pools mirroring CDP services for load-testing new infra.

engineers.narrative: Built PostHog's engineering_analytics product end-to-end: a private curated warehouse read layer feeding typed MCP tools and a CI analytics UI scene, plus an ASGI device-auth fix and a hogli CLI lazy-load refactor. Deep, cross-cutting work reaching 100+ authors.

evidence.title: feat(engineering_analytics): CI analytics scene
evidence.summary: Shipped read-only CI analytics scene: routes, product config, PR/workflow-health views over backend queries.

evidence.title: feat(engineering_analytics): private read layer + typed endpoints
evidence.summary: Added private read layer with curated queries, typed contracts, and scoped engineering_analytics endpoints for agents.

evidence.title: feat(engineering_analytics): cost/friction lens + warehouse-shape fix
evidence.summary: Added CI cost/friction lens; fixed warehouse string/Nullable parsing that 500'd every endpoint on real data.

engineers.narrative: Hardened PostHog's feature-flags serving path end-to-end: built a lazy per-token auth cache with signal-driven and periodic Redis invalidation, preloaded flag-referenced cohorts into the flags hypercache, and added per-team request/response logging plus encrypted-payload and instance-setting audit safeguards.

evidence.title: feat(flags): add per-team request/response body logging
evidence.summary: Added opt-in per-team /flags request/response body logging, polled ~60s by the Rust service.

evidence.title: feat(flags): implement lazy per-token auth cache with targeted invalidation
evidence.summary: Built lazy per-token auth cache with signal-driven targeted Redis invalidation on token/user changes.

evidence.title: feat(flags): preload referenced cohorts in flags hypercache
evidence.summary: Preloaded flag-referenced cohorts and transitive deps into flags hypercache via BFS, skipping recalc-only saves.

engineers.narrative: Drove deep HogQL query-engine work: rebuilt the ClickHouse funnel UDF on a RowBinary codec, re-architected events predicate pushdown, and made lazy joins serializable; also shipped the string-only materialized-column (dmat) slot pool with a Temporal backfill workflow.

evidence.title: feat: funnel binary
evidence.summary: Rewrote funnel ClickHouse UDF on RowBinary codec with chunking and trends/steps variant binaries.

evidence.title: refactor(hogql): redesign events predicate pushdown on the lowering architecture
evidence.summary: Re-architected HogQL events predicate pushdown atop the lowering layer, simplifying generated cohort SQL.

evidence.title: feat(dmat): part 2: batched backfill workflow
evidence.summary: Added batched Temporal backfill workflow for materialized columns with slot activity logging.

engineers.narrative: Drove PostHog's error-tracking V3 query rewrite end-to-end: a denormalized ClickHouse fingerprint-issue-state table (Kafka MV), optimized HogQL joins/aggregations dropping Postgres joins, plus frontend schema and batched recommendation sweeps cutting query latency at scale.

evidence.title: feat: pending issue state updates
evidence.summary: UNIONs client-side pending issue-state updates into the ClickHouse argMax subquery to mask Kafka-to-CH sync lag.

evidence.title: feat(error-tracking): optimize query v3
evidence.summary: Optimizes V3 query with argMin/Max/sumForEach state aggregations and a new HogQL fingerprint-issue-state table join.

evidence.title: perf(error-tracking): apply remaining v3 issues-list optimizations
evidence.summary: Rewrites issue-state join to group by cityHash64 fingerprint hash with direct toNullable argMax aggregation.
